title: delka Unscented Tea Lights White-Long-Lasting 4 Hour Burn Time-Smoke-Free Bright Flame-Ideal for Weddings, Events, Aromatherapy, Home Décor, and Emergency Use-Premium Quality (White, 50 Pack)
features: Reliable 4-Hour Burn Time: Each tea light offers up to 4 hours of consistent, steady light, perfect for dinners, events, and relaxation.
Premium Wax for Consistent Performance: Made with high-quality wax for a clean, even burn, ensuring a bright and steady flame.
Clean and Smoke-Free Flame: Designed to burn cleanly without soot or smoke, creating a safe and soothing atmosphere.
Perfect for Any Occasion: Great for weddings, parties, aromatherapy sessions, or as a backup light during power outages.
Fits Standard Holders: Compact and convenient design ensures compatibility with tea light holders, lanterns, and centerpieces.
